sections.name: Dinner menu
items: Mozzarella di Bufala - imported buffalo mozzarella, roasted bell peppers, capers, basil, extra virgin olive oil
Cavolo - Tuscan kale, radishes, croutons, lemon-parmesan dressing
Carciofini - lemon marinated baby artichokes, frisee, shaved parmesan
Mista - field greens, cucumbers, carrots, grape tomatoes, Dijon vinaigrette
Fava e Pecorino - fava beans, Pecorino DOP, olive oil, arugula
Barbabietole - roasted beets, little gem, pistachio pesto, whipped Capriolo goat cheese and ricotta
Prosciutto di Parma - sliced melon
Burrata - Italian mortadella, pistachios, aged balsamic, marinated roasted grapes
Vitello Tonnato - poached veal, sunchokes, hazelnuts, tuna caper sauce
Funghi al Forno - wood roasted oyster mushrooms, house cured pancetta, aged balsamic, radicchio, spinach
Frittura - fried calamari and shrimp, lemon
Minestrone - spring vegetable and white bean soup with pine nut-basil pesto
Ravioli Piccolo Sogno - four cheese ravioli, pine nuts, butter, Marsala glaze, parmesan curls
Spaghetti Neri - mussels, clams, shrimp, calamari, San Marzano tomatoes, red chili flakes
Lasagna - spinach pasta sheets, bechamel, Bolognese sauce
Agnolotti Prosciutto e Piselli - pea green and ricotta stuffed pasta, English peas, Prosciutto di Parma
Gnocchi - spring nettle and potato dumplings, slow-braised oxtail ragu
Pappardelle con Cinghiale - spiced wild boar ragu
Margherita pizza
Bianca pizza
Rossa con Stracciatella pizza
Prosciutto pizza
Salmone - roasted Loch Duart salmon, roasted peppers, olives, chickpea and olive oil puree, artichoke, frisee and herb salad
Halibut al Forno - roasted Alaskan halibut, sunchoke puree, farro, spring vegetables, white wine, lemon
Griglia Mista - grilled calamari, octopus, shrimp, grilled gem lettuce, lemon caper reduction
Petto di Pollo - wood roasted chicken breast, semolina, spring mushrooms, goat cheese
Rosticciana - braised beef short ribs, local white corn polenta, sauteed spring greens, red wine, aromatic vegetables
Bistecca alla Griglia - grilled local ribeye, arugula, onion, tomato salad

notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted Piccolo Sogno menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menus explicitly mention pistachio pesto, pistachios, hazelnuts, and pine nuts in multiple dishes.
Several dishes are marked GF or GFA, which is useful menu-level labeling, but the pasted menu does not include a dedicated allergen handling statement.
